title: hypericum barbatum var. calabricum
intro: Hypericum barbatum var. calabricum, also known as a variety of the St. John's Wort plant, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Hypericum barbatum var. calabricum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are typically infused in oil or used in teas to extract its medicinal properties, although the exact preparation methods may vary depending on the intended use.
